rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Command Shell Unusual or Suspicious Process Ancestry

rules.rule_text:
title: Command Shell Unusual or Suspicious Process Ancestry
id: 157c153a-97d1-43e4-bc25-5461f52c935d
status: experimental
description: Looks for suspicious process interactions between the Windows IIS worker
  process (w3wp.exe) and the command shell. Inspired by the 2022 Red Canary Threat
  Detection report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-command-shell/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/03
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1505
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_process:
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \w3wp.exe
    - \wmiprvse.exe
  selection_cmdline:
  - CommandLine|contains:
    - http://
    - https://
    - echo
  - CommandLine|contains|all:
    - /c
    - powershell.exe
  condition: selection_process and selection_cmdline
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
